function.name: view_file
function.description: Read contents of a file on the local filesystem. Returns content with line numbers.

absolute_path.description: Absolute Windows path to the file.

function.name: write_file
function.description: Create a new file or completely overwrite an existing file. Triggers a user validation diff.

absolute_path.description: Absolute Windows path to the target file.

overwrite.description: Set to true to force overwrite an existing file.

function.name: edit_file_content
function.description: Edit a specific block of text in an existing file. The replacement is audited through a user diff prompt.

absolute_path.description: Absolute Windows path to the target file.

target_content.description: The exact string block in the file to be replaced. Must be a unique match.

replacement_content.description: The replacement content to drop in.

function.name: run_command
function.description: Propose and execute a shell command via PowerShell on Windows. Can be run in foreground (blocking) or background (non-blocking).

command.description: The exact PowerShell command line to execute.

cwd.description: The working directory for command execution.

background.description: Set to true to spawn the command as a non-blocking background task. Otherwise runs in foreground.

function.name: manage_task
function.description: Interact with and manage running background tasks.

action.description: The action to perform: 'list' (list all background tasks), 'kill' (cancel a task), 'status' (get tail logs and exit code), 'send_input' (send stdin to running task).

task_id.description: The specific task ID to manage. Required for 'kill', 'status', and 'send_input'.

input.description: The text string to send to the task stdin. Required when action is 'send_input'.

function.name: list_dir
function.description: List directory contents including names, paths, sizes, and file types.

directory_path.description: Absolute Windows path to list contents of.

function.name: grep_search
function.description: Search recursively for a text pattern or regex query across local files, skipping binary and system folders.

search_path.description: Absolute Windows path to search within.

query.description: The search term or regex pattern.

case_insensitive.description: Set to true to ignore case.

is_regex.description: Set to true if query is a regex pattern.

include_globs.description: Optional list of glob patterns to filter target files (e.g. ['*.py', '*.md']).

max_results.description: Maximum number of matches to return (default 20). Helps prevent oversized context payloads.

truncate_content.description: Max characters per content line (default 250). Set to 0 for no truncation. Prevents long lines from flooding context.
